title: Blueprints Applied
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS crafts FROM EngineerCraft WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT BlueprintName AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM EngineerCraft WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY BlueprintName ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {crafts} engineer blueprint application(s) during the report period. Your most-crafted blueprints are the foundation of your build identity — a commander hammering Frame Shift Drive range mods is building an explorer, while someone repeatedly crafting Charge Enhanced Power Plants is optimising for deep combat.
details.help: EngineerCraft fires for each blueprint application at an engineer's workshop. crafts drives the title as the total crafting session count.

tagLines: Engineer blueprint application log compiled. Module upgrade activity archived in the engineering record.
Every craft was a roll of the dice. You kept rolling until the module said what you needed.
The most-crafted blueprint is the one you needed most. That's more honest than you might expect.
